note: Toast-banner conformance ratchet baseline (shrink-only) for this connector, enforced by the reusable toast-banner-gate (cinatra-ai/cinatra#1213 AC3). Each entry is a src/ file that CURRENTLY renders a searchParams-flash-driven transient banner (a success/destructive <Alert> or a flash-palette colored <div> gated on a transient-outcome query param). The canonical transient-notification layer is the toast island: route flash outcomes through the codes-only <SearchParamToast> island (@cinatra-ai/sdk-ui) and imperative notifications through cinatraToast / useNotify. The gate FAILS when a file NOT in this baseline starts matching (a new/reintroduced banner) and when a baseline entry no longer matches (it must be REMOVED — the ratchet only shrinks). class=pending-migration entries are transient banners still awaiting migration to the island (they must ratchet to zero).

entries.reason: Residual searchParams(?error)-driven transient <Alert> banners (success 'Sender email addresses refreshed.' and a destructive visibleError banner) on main. This connector's toast-migration (epic toast-notifications, slice S4) has NOT landed on main (no toast/island commit in this repo's history). Detection-only entry: the gate still FAILS on any NEW banner. REMOVE this entry (the ratchet only shrinks) when the migration lands and these become the <SearchParamToast> island. Tracked under cinatra-ai/cinatra#1213 AC3.
